# GitHub Copilot Assets

This folder stores GitHub Copilot customization assets for coding workflows.

## Repository Structure

- `agents/`: custom agent definitions (`*.agent.md`)
- `instructions/`: reusable instructions (`*.instructions.md`)
- `prompts/`: reusable prompt templates (`*.prompt.md`)
- `skills/`: reusable skill packages (`<name>/SKILL.md`)

See each subdirectory `README.md` for format and examples.
